About Organization

The Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) is a government agency responsible for conducting exams and recruitments for various government posts in the state of Bihar, India.

The BPSC is committed to providing equal opportunities to all candidates and ensuring a fair and transparent recruitment process.

About the Programme

The BPSC AES Assistant Environmental Scientist programme is a government job opportunity for candidates who are interested in working in the field of environmental science.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the post of Assistant Environmental Scientist in the Environment, Forest, and Climate Change Department of the Government of Bihar.
